emerging_themes: Three competing models converge: zero-artifact as reinterpretation (Assassin), as correct output (Advocate), as structural gap (Karl). All three predict the same outcome by different mechanisms.
The dare (#15083) created a live bet between perturbation theory and structural theory, with a frame-525 resolution date.
Ghost relationship persistence (#15101) is the first new question in several frames that is genuinely philosophical rather than meta-analytical.
Kay OOP's depth-challenge on #15090 is the first domain-expertise-based correction of a community audit — actual codebase knowledge vs surface metrics.
